nodes.context: British street gang based in Brixton, South London, formed in late 2000s, involved in drug trafficking, murder, theft, money laundering.
Local gang based in Somerleyton Estate, allied with GAS Gang.
Local gang based in Myatts Field, predecessor to GAS Gang through Tiny OC.

nodes.original_text_name: Original Brooklyn Youths (OBY) / Brooklyn Family Riders (BFR)
nodes.context: Local gang allied with GAS Gang.
Local gang allied with GAS Gang.
Stockwell-based gang, rival of GAS Gang.

Peckham-based gang, rival of GAS Gang.
Peckham-based gang, rival of GAS Gang.
Tulse Hill-based gang, rival of GAS Gang.
Previous dominant gang in Angell Town Estate, fragmented by early 2000s.
Gang that emerged from PDC fragmentation, later merged to form GAS Gang.
Gang based in Myatts Field, merged with Y28s to form GAS Gang.
Splinter faction from GAS Gang, later known in UK drill scene.
Splinter faction from GAS Gang from Somerleyton Estate.
Splinter group from GAS Gang around Brixton Road.
Gang based in Loughborough Junction that merged with GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as Murder Zone (MZ)
edges.context: GAS Gang had affiliations with Murder Zone.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Organised Crime (OC)
edges.context: GAS Gang had affiliations with Organised Crime.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Original Brooklyn Youths (OBY) / Brooklyn Family Riders (BFR)
edges.context: GAS Gang had affiliations with Original Brooklyn Youths.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Roadside G's.
edges.context: GAS Gang had affiliations with Roadside G's.

edges.evidence_quote: This was the start of GAS Gang's conflict with Stockwell-based gang, ABM (All Bout Money).
edges.context: GAS Gang had a conflict with ABM.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with Croydon-based gang DSN (Don't Say Nuttin).
edges.context: GAS Gang had conflict with DSN.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... GMG based in Peckham.
edges.context: GAS Gang had conflict with GMG.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... PYG (Peckham Young Guns) ... based in Peckham.
edges.context: GAS Gang had conflict with PYG.

edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... TN1 (Trust No-One) based in Tulse Hill.
edges.context: GAS Gang had conflict with TN1.

edges.evidence_quote: Y28s and Tiny OC had formed a rivalry with Peckham-based gangs, and at one point gang members were caught unarmed by Peckham gang members, leading to one of their members being stabbed. This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.
edges.context: Y28s and Tiny OC united to form GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.
edges.context: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.

edges.evidence_quote: This convinced members of Y28s and Tiny OC that they needed to unite together as one, leading to GAS Gang being created.
edges.context: GAS Gang was formed from the merger of Y28s and Tiny OC.

edges.evidence_quote: Another gang, Loughborough Bois based in Loughborough Junction, decided to merge with GAS Gang.
edges.context: Loughborough Bois merged with GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: some younger members of GAS Gang now referring to themselves as GAS Rockblock 150 (or Rockblock 150, and later simply 150).
edges.context: 150 is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: some GAS Gang members from Somerleyton Estate now referring to themselves as GAS Siru or Siru.
edges.context: Siru is a splinter faction from GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Another split-off occurred around Brixton Road, with a group of GAS Gang youngers forming a new group called Villa Road.
edges.context: Villa Road is a splinter group from GAS Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: 150 would develop a rivalry with Brixton Hill-based group 67.

PDC, which was the dominant gang in the area at the time, began to fragment due to many of its leaders being imprisoned. Various different groups emerged from this fragmentation, such as the Muslim Boys and Y28s
edges.context: Y28s, a predecessor of GAS Gang, emerged from the fragmentation of PDC.
